seo.title: Collision Repair Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your collision shop. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Collision Repair
hero.subheading: Insurance timelines drag. ReviewFlo asks when keys are back and paint finally matches.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Collision Shop Faces

items.heading: Stress starts at the tow truck
items.body: Customers are already shaken before they meet you.

items.heading: Supplement delays feel like broken promises
items.body: Waiting weeks turns into angry posts.

items.heading: Quality issues show up in sunlight later
items.body: Overspray and blend lines become public photos.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Body Shops

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send at delivery, not at drop-off
items.body: Ask when the car looks right in their hands.

items.heading: Private first for rental and supplement fights
items.body: Insurance stress gets a direct line.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, after repairs that made the car feel whole again.
Private feedback helps you communicate delays before stars fall.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing without MSO enterprise pricing.
Send only after emotional closure on the outcome.
Private messages help before public arguments.
